productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Stripes Purple Tshirts
description: Composition Purple polo neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has pink, green, red and black stripes, ribbed collar with tape detailing on the inseam, long sleeves, buttoned chest placket, embroidered brand detailing on the upper left chest and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in warm water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Coloured stripes and long sleeves lend a preppy feel to this purple polo neck T-shirt from status quo. The embroidered brand detailing on the upper left chest enhances the brand image. Crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team this with jeans or chinos. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 19"
